title: Agent Runtime Status

cards.title: Runtime Queue
cards.body: The queue shows which safe work packet should happen next.

cards.title: Trading Lab Bridge
cards.body: Trading Lab work routes through evidence, risk, replay, ranking, and next-action files.

cards.title: Safety Locks
cards.body: Live trading, brokers, OANDA, API keys, secrets, real webhooks, and real orders are blocked.

cards.title: Next Build
cards.body: Run the read-only runtime validator before selecting the next task.
